body:
goodtransgirl:

On mornings we get up at the same time, I love to slip into the kitchen to watch her morning ritual of making coffee, there’s just something special about the way she looks to take care of us both in this way. But today, she let me sleep in a little, deciding I need the extra rest. She has a little bit of her own cup, buying me just a little more time for sleep. She then picks up the two mugs she’s prepared and crosses to the bedroom, the steam of the cups trailing behind her.

She leans over and sets my cup on the bedside table, her hair brushing against my face, I stir slightly, but don’t quite wake up. This follows with her actual wakeup, a long slow kiss to rise me from her slumber. My eyes open and I sink into the kiss for a moment, savoring the flavor of coffee of it. When she pulls away, I smile wide and follow with a response I’ve repeated so many times, “Yay! Coffee Kisses!” And my eyes linger for a moment on her in the oversized t-shirt and panties, before she slips back into sitting beside me in b
